title: Humanist Project (fall)
detail: 8-week clown, Mondays 7–10pm, Houghton Hall, Manhattan, ~$450. Fall 2026 dates not yet posted. Email thehumanistproject.org/contact.

title: Fire Ensemble (fall)
detail: Free weekly gospel/R&B choir, BIPOC + queer-centered. Fall session TBD. RSVP submitted at fireensemble.com/choir-form.

title: MGC printmaking (fall semester)
detail: 322 3rd Ave, Gowanus. Email mgc@powerhousearts.org for fall semester. Sliding scale; membership adds open studio + 25% off.

title: Brooklynite Choir (fall cycle)
detail: On waitlist. No audition, no sheet music, learn by ear, ~$22/session. Fall cycle likely opens August.

title: Target Margin fall 2026 season
detail: Doxsee Theater, Sunset Park. TMT Laboratory (writer-director development) runs Sept–Oct. Full fall season TBA.

title: PhysFest NYC 2027 (Jan)
detail: Physical Theater Festival — 10 days, ~50 shows + free workshops. Stella Adler Center for the Arts. 2026 ran Jan 8–18; 2027 dates TBA.

title: Under the Radar Festival (Jan 2027)
detail: Public Theater's annual international avant-garde theater festival. Typically mid-January (2026 ran Jan 14–25). 2027 dates TBA.

title: Prototype Festival (Jan 13–23, 2027)
detail: Contemporary opera + music-theater festival. HERE, La MaMa, Joe's Pub, St. Ann's Warehouse, National Sawdust, and more.

title: Exponential Festival 2027 (January)
detail: 12th annual month-long experimental performance festival across 8 Brooklyn venues: Brick Aux, Brooklyn Art Haus, JACK, Life World, Loading Dock, Mercury Store, Target Margin's Doxsee, The Brick. 19+ NYC artists. Curated by Jillian Jetton & Matthew Antoci.
